parsed_output.justification: Matt, Mike, and Alana have claims that corroborate each other: Matt (Seer) identified Mike as the Robber, and Mike (Robber) confirmed he robbed Alana, who claimed to be the Insomniac. Mitchell's claim as the Troublemaker is the only one that is not verified by any other player's observation or action. While his eagerness to be voted out is characteristic of the Tanner, he is the only player whose story is not corroborated, making him the most likely candidate for the Werewolf.
